arts.sum: Manchester United host Everton this Sunday, with Ruben Amorim aiming to attain his first league win with the Red Devils. The Portuguese tactician announced himself to the United faithful on Thursday night as he guided his players to a 3-2 victory over Bodo/Glimt.
